name: webloom
description: 86 tools: drive YOUR real Chrome via CDP (real session, real cookies, real fingerprint) + browse/buy/install/publish Threads from inside chat. Multi-strategy fallback ladders (5 upload paths, framework-aware setters for React/Lexical/Draft.js/Quill). Per-site protocol cracks (X transaction-id, TikTok signer). In-chat marketplace at webloom.run. Telemetry off by default.
